message: 🌱 Add dify: [☂️] Dify Trigger — Event-driven Workflow Foundation mission (#721)

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "dify: [☂️] Dify Trigger — Event-driven Workflow Foundation",
+    "description": "[☂️] Dify Trigger — Event-driven Workflow Foundation. Requested by 17+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current dify deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your dify version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify\nhelm list -n dify 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working dify installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review dify configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant dify configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify\nkubectl get configmap -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dify\n```\nTrigger = **When something → then do something**\n\nThis is the foundation for event-driven Workflow capabilities, covering the following types:\n\n* **Schedule** (time-based triggers)\n* **SaaS Integration Event** (events from external SaaS platforms"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [☂️] Dify Trigger — Event-driven Workflow Foundation",
+        "description": "This PR implements the frontend foundation for the Dify Trigger system, providing a complete framework for trigger-based workflows.\n```yaml\n[☂️] Dify Trigger —\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify\nkubectl get events -n dify --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[☂️] Dify Trigger — Event-driven Workflow Foundation\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR implements the frontend foundation for the Dify Trigger system, providing a complete framework for trigger-based workflows.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[☂️] Dify Trigger —",
+        "### Frontend Readiness Status\n\nFrontend UI and data processing logic completed, following existing node patterns. Complete data structure defined and ready for backend development reference.\n\n**Related Issues:** Addresses #24001\nTrigger introduction docs completed, https://www.notion.so/Trigger-tech-design-README-2550ad0f26b980359ad3e6b4d8e21f7e , after a talk offline, we'd like to cooperate under the notion workspace.\nPR #24358 created for #23995 \nWorkflow Async Entry completed, already merged to feat/trigger, \n### How to test\nPlease ensure you've launched worker through .vscode/launch.json.example"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
